name: HeroQuest
description: HeroQuest is the seminal 1989 dungeon-crawl from Milton Bradley and Games Workshop — one player runs the dungeon as Zargon, the evil sorcerer, while up to four heroes (Barbarian, Dwarf, Elf, Wizard) explore modular stone-tile corridors, battle orcs and goblins, hoard treasure, and complete a campaign of fourteen quests. Plastic Citadel-style minis, custom dice, hand-painted nostalgia. Reissued by Avalon Hill in 2021. The dungeon crawl that launched a thousand basements.
